subject: TIEMPO-393: Spotlighter Role - CalOps Tasks
body:
Dash,

New feature ticket: TIEMPO-393 - Spotlighter (SL) Role

## WHAT IS SPOTLIGHTER?

A new role that allows designated users to add spotlight info (DJ, Instructor, Performer, Orchestra, Notes) to ANY event without editing the core event data.

## CALOPS TASKS

### 1. SL Management UI
- Add Spotlighter section in user management
- List users with SL role
- Grant SL role to user (add roleId to userlogins.roleIds)
- Revoke SL role from user

### 2. Application Flow (DECISION NEEDED)
- Option A: Admin-only grant (RA/SA assigns SL directly)
- Option B: Application flow (like RO apply → approve)
- Recommendation: Start with Option A (simpler)

## CURRENT STATE
- ✅ SL role exists in roles collection (TEST + PROD)
- ✅ BE permission check ready (CALBEAF-91)
- ❌ FE role-switcher (my task)
- ❌ CalOps management UI (your task)

## ROLE ID
Spotlighter roleId (same in TEST + PROD):
- Need to query roles collection for exact ObjectId
- roleName: 'Spotlighter'

Let me know if you have questions!

— Sarah
